description: Dry-run an Opentrons Protocol API v2 file via opentrons_simulate (read-only, no physical robot).
rules: read-only — never controls a physical robot
runs the opentrons package simulator (opentrons_simulate) against PROTOCOL_FILE
simulated run log + any errors are captured to record_store/simulate.log
if the opentrons package is absent the porter degrades gracefully (writes log, exits 0)
usage: Set PROTOCOL_FILE (an Opentrons Protocol API v2 .py file). Output: simulate.log.
limitation: Requires the opentrons Python package on PATH to actually simulate; without it the run log is empty/degraded. Never executes on hardware.
